announcements.title: Important General Notice: Library Working Hours Extended
announcements.description: Library reading rooms will remain open until 08:30 PM everyday for semester exam preparations.
announcements.actionRequired: Use library card scanner for late entries. Maintain discipline.
announcements.summary: Important update regarding General Notice on NEC campus.

announcements.title: Robotics and Coding Clubs Member Inductions
announcements.description: Recruiting core group and junior coordinators for technical clubs. Participate in mini challenge rounds.
announcements.actionRequired: Register for club recruitment form and attend offline briefing.

announcements.title: NEC Smart Campus Generative AI Hackathon
announcements.description: Build creative automation utilities and dashboards. Team size 2-4 students. Cash prizes for winners.
announcements.actionRequired: Create a devpost submission and register team on Devpost hackfest portal.
announcements.summary: Important update regarding Hackathon on NEC campus.

announcements.title: NVIDIA Summer Internship Program
announcements.description: A 6-month hands-on industry experience internship at NVIDIA for pre-final year students. Opportunity for full time job pre-placement offer based on performance review.
announcements.actionRequired: Submit resume in PDF format on LMS placement link before deadline.
announcements.summary: Important update regarding Internship on NEC campus.

announcements.title: Cognizant Campus Placement Recruitment Drive 2026
announcements.description: Cognizant is recruiting software developers, product managers, and system analysts. Selection stages include coding assessment and technical interviews.
announcements.actionRequired: Register on Cognizant career portal and submit your credentials to college Placement Officer.
announcements.summary: Important update regarding Placement on NEC campus.
